personal.tagline: I help entrepreneurs, businesses, and brands establish a digital presence with modern, fast, and professional websites, systems, and solutions.
personal.about: I am a software developer focused on creating functional websites, applications, and digital solutions. I use modern tools to build projects that help businesses and entrepreneurs get organized, showcase their services, and grow digitally.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Learn how I can help you
about.p1: I am a software developer focused on creating functional websites, applications, and digital solutions. I use modern tools to build projects that help businesses and entrepreneurs get organized, showcase their services, and grow digitally.
about.p2: My approach goes beyond simply writing code; it's about understanding what each project needs to turn an idea into a clear, useful, and professional solution.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: How I can help you grow
services.s1_desc: I design modern, fast, and mobile-friendly websites to showcase your business professionally.
services.s2_desc: I build web applications and systems to help you organize processes, automate tasks, and manage your business better.
services.s3_desc: I develop custom tools for customer management, expense tracking, inventory, and other business needs.
services.s4_desc: I help you establish a clear, professional online presence ready to attract more customers.

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: My development process
process.p1_desc: I understand your goals, audience, and technical requirements in depth.
process.p2_desc: I create wireframes and a clear visual proposal before writing any code.
process.p3_desc: Implementation in sprints with iterative deliveries and continuous feedback.
process.p4_desc: Deployment to production, monitoring, and long-term maintenance.

benefits.title: Why choose me
benefits.subtitle: Benefits of working together
benefits.b1_desc: Every tool is built from scratch to adapt to what you truly need and solve your specific problems.
benefits.b2_desc: Your websites and systems will look perfect and work flawlessly on any mobile device or large screen.
benefits.b3_desc: Platforms designed to load in seconds so your users never get frustrated, while ensuring sensitive data is secure.
benefits.b4_desc: I guarantee you will know how to use everything upon delivery, and you will always have my support if you need help.

pricing.title: Detailed plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the best plan for you
pricing.p1_desc: Ideal for entrepreneurs to validate ideas.
pricing.p1_urgency: Only available for the first clients
pricing.p2_desc: Scale your business with a robust digital solution.

faq.title: Help Center
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How long does a project usually take?
faq.a1: A landing page can take 2 to 3 weeks. More complex web applications usually require between 1 and 3 months, depending on the scope.
faq.q2: Do you work with other technologies besides React?
faq.a2: Yes, although my specialty is the React ecosystem (Next.js, Vite, React Native), I also have experience with Vue and Node.js for the backend.
faq.q3: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
faq.a3: Of course! My higher-tier plans include support, and I also offer custom monthly maintenance plans.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your project
contact.idea: Do you have an idea in mind?
contact.desc: I'm available for freelance projects, consulting, or joining a great team. Write to me and I will reply in less than 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Tell me more about your idea...
contact.thanks: Thanks! I have received your message. I will contact you very soon.

testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real testimonials
testimonials.empty_desc: Be the first to tell your experience working with me.
testimonials.leave_desc: Your opinion is super valuable to me. Tell me briefly how your experience was working together.

footer.desc: Designing and developing exceptional web applications that drive business growth.
footer.built: Built with React, Vite and Tailwind CSS.
